input_data.request: Please scan the manuscript for oddities and outliers in the text that don't align with the standard language of the field.

output_data.response: Fixed. I actually hash-compared all 14 files this time — **14/14 byte-identical to `origin/main`** — and corrected the handoff wording to state the full check rather than generalizing from the single casey spot-check. Updated in both the repo file and the artifact (v2, [handoff-2026-07-08-18-42-submodule-roundtrip-figure-refresh.md]({{artifact:28c346b7-76ec-4811-b8f6-cdf9b27cfad6}})).

name: Scan Manuscript for Language Oddities
task_summary: Review the manuscript for non-standard terminology, unusual phrasing, and field-specific language inconsistencies that may indicate errors, jargon issues, or domain misalignment. Flag any outliers in vocabulary or expression that deviate from accepted conventions in the field.
status_description: Verify and review the completed handoff documentation that confirms all 14 files are byte-identical to origin/main after submodule roundtrip and figure refresh. Ensure handoff context is fully captured for next session transition.
